final:
// // This module implements a 2-to-1 multiplexer with an enable signal. When the enable signal (en) is deasserted, the output (y) reflects input b; when it is asserted, the output will reflect input a.
module top_module(
    input wire  a,
    input wire  b,
    input wire  en,
    output reg y  // Changed 'wire' to 'reg' here
);always @*
    begin
      if (en)
        begin
          y = b;
        end
      else
        begin
          y = a;
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 2-to-1 multiplexer with an enable signal. When the enable signal (en) is deasserted, the output (y) reflects input b; when it is asserted, the output will reflect input a.
